source_assets.notes: Primary paper-level AI ingestion corpus used for counts, modalities, targets, and representative papers.
Aggregated indication -> modality -> target evidence graph used for modality and target snapshots.
Protocol-cluster candidates ranked by support score.
Safety and contraindication heuristic extraction over the same corpus.

protocol_personalization_notes: Use this file as a retrieval and ranking prior for protocol personalization, not as a stand-alone prescribing source.
Always resolve candidate protocols back to the authoritative condition package and device-specific governance before export.
Top literature-weighted modalities for this condition are general_neuromodulation, vagus_nerve_stimulation, deep_brain_stimulation.
Highest-support protocol cluster in the imported bundle is vagus_nerve_stimulation targeting vagus_nerve.
Most frequent safety-monitoring signals in matched papers are seizure_risk, pediatric_caution, cognitive_adverse_effect.
